title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Manufacturing Engineer for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd!
